items.title: World Cup boss who tormented England QUITS after nearly a decade in charge as he leaves ‘remarkable legacy’
items.summary: ZLATKO DALIC has left his role as Croatia boss after nine years in charge. The nation crashed out of the World Cup last week following a controversial 2-1 loss to Portugal in Toronto. Croatia were denied a 103rd-minute equaliser when Igor Matanovic was adjudged to have headed the ball to an offside

items.title: England World Cup rivals in meltdown as they share statement over shock claims stars forced to pay BRIBES to get picked
items.summary: GHANA'S FA have been forced to deny shock allegations that it accepted bribes from players to get picked for the national team. The claims come just days after Ghana were eliminated from the World Cup by Colombia. The nation's governing body said the claims came from a "purported" relative of Ghana
